tasks.subject: Task 0: Data directory setup + path migration
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Create `data/`, populate `data/watches.json`, move `monitor_state.json` to `data/`, and update all references so the monitor still runs cleanly.

**Files:**
- Create: `data/watches.json`
- Modify: `watch_monitor.py` line 52 (STATE_FILE path)
- Modify: `.github/workflows/monitor.yml` lines 53–66 (git add references)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] `data/watches.json` exists with all 5 Longines refs
- [ ] `watch_monitor.py` STATE_FILE resolves to `data/monitor_state.json`
- [ ] `python watch_monitor.py --test` runs without Python error
- [ ] `monitor.yml` git add references `data/monitor_state.json` and `data/deals.json`

**Verify:** `python watch_monitor.py --test` → no traceback

```json:metadata
{"files": ["data/watches.json", "watch_monitor.py", ".github/workflows/monitor.yml"], "verifyCommand": "python watch_monitor.py --test", "acceptanceCriteria": ["data/watches.json exists with 5 refs", "STATE_FILE path is data/monitor_state.json", "monitor.yml references data/ paths"], "modelTier": "mechanical"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 1: Monitor deal tagging and persistence
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Extend `watch_monitor.py` so every new listing is tagged with brand/model/ref/dial/strap from the registry and appended to `data/deals.json`.

**Files:**
- Modify: `watch_monitor.py`
- Create: `tests/__init__.py`
- Create: `tests/test_tagging.py`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] tag_deal returns all 9 enrichment fields
- [ ] ref_matches empty when no ref in title
- [ ] is_hot correct at/above/with-None price
- [ ] save_deals creates and appends
- [ ] 11 tests pass

**Verify:** `pytest tests/test_tagging.py -v` → 11 passed

```json:metadata
{"files": ["watch_monitor.py", "tests/__init__.py", "tests/test_tagging.py"], "verifyCommand": "pytest tests/test_tagging.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["tag_deal returns all 9 enrichment fields", "ref_matches empty when no ref in title", "is_hot correct", "save_deals creates and appends", "11 tests pass"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Flask backend
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Create a minimal Flask server with 3 routes: GET /, GET /api/deals, GET /api/watches.

**Files:**
- Create: `webapp/flask/app.py`
- Create: `webapp/flask/tests/__init__.py`
- Create: `webapp/flask/tests/test_app.py`
- Create: `webapp/flask/templates/index.html` (stub)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] GET / returns 200 with Watch Deals in body
- [ ] GET /api/deals returns [] or file contents
- [ ] GET /api/watches returns [] or file contents
- [ ] 5 tests pass

**Verify:** `pytest webapp/flask/tests/test_app.py -v` → 5 passed

```json:metadata
{"files": ["webapp/flask/app.py", "webapp/flask/templates/index.html", "webapp/flask/tests/__init__.py", "webapp/flask/tests/test_app.py"], "verifyCommand": "pytest webapp/flask/tests/test_app.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["GET / returns 200", "GET /api/deals returns [] or contents", "GET /api/watches returns [] or contents", "5 tests pass"], "modelTier": "mechanical"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Flask frontend — HTML and CSS
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Replace stub index.html with full Dark Luxury Data Dense page shell and complete stylesheet.

**Files:**
- Modify: `webapp/flask/templates/index.html`
- Create: `webapp/flask/static/style.css`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Near-black background (#07070d) loads
- [ ] Gold WATCH DEALS header (#c9a84c)
- [ ] 9-section sidebar visible
- [ ] Gold table headers visible
- [ ] No missing-element JS errors

**Verify:** `python webapp/flask/app.py` then open `http://localhost:5000`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["webapp/flask/templates/index.html", "webapp/flask/static/style.css"], "verifyCommand": "python webapp/flask/app.py", "acceptanceCriteria": ["near-black background", "gold header", "9-section sidebar", "gold table headers", "no JS errors"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Flask frontend — JavaScript
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Wire up app.js — fetch, populate dropdowns, render table, all filtering/sorting/interactions.

**Files:**
- Create: `webapp/flask/static/app.js`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Rows render from /api/deals
- [ ] Last-sync shows relative time
- [ ] Dropdowns populated from data
- [ ] Model scoped to brand
- [ ] Source checkboxes dynamic
- [ ] All 9 filters work live
- [ ] Sort works (newest/price-asc/price-desc)
- [ ] Result count correct
- [ ] Row click opens URL in new tab
- [ ] Clear resets all controls
- [ ] Empty state when no matches

**Verify:** Flask with 3-deal test fixture, open http://localhost:5000, exercise all 11 behaviors.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["webapp/flask/static/app.js"], "verifyCommand": "python webapp/flask/app.py  # with test fixture", "acceptanceCriteria": ["rows render", "last-sync time", "dropdowns populated", "model scoped to brand", "source checkboxes dynamic", "all filters live", "sort works", "result count", "row click opens URL", "clear resets", "empty state"], "modelTier": "frontier"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: Streamlit app
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Build Streamlit alternative reading data/deals.json with same filter dimensions.

**Files:**
- Create: `webapp/streamlit/app.py`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] App starts without error
- [ ] Table shows deals
- [ ] All 9 sidebar filters present
- [ ] Filtering rerenders table
- [ ] Empty state when no file
- [ ] Result count shown

**Verify:** `python -m streamlit run webapp/streamlit/app.py` → open http://localhost:8501, filter by brand.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["webapp/streamlit/app.py"], "verifyCommand": "python -m streamlit run webapp/streamlit/app.py", "acceptanceCriteria": ["app starts", "table shows deals", "9 filters in sidebar", "filtering works", "empty state", "result count"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: Startup script and requirements update
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Write webapp/start.sh one-click launcher and update requirements.txt.

**Files:**
- Create: `webapp/start.sh`
- Modify: `requirements.txt`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Flask starts on :5000
- [ ] Streamlit starts on :8501
- [ ] Both browser tabs open
- [ ] Re-run kills existing instances
- [ ] pip install -r requirements.txt succeeds

**Verify:** `bash webapp/start.sh` → both tabs open within ~3 seconds.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["webapp/start.sh", "requirements.txt"], "verifyCommand": "bash webapp/start.sh", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Flask on :5000", "Streamlit on :8501", "both tabs open", "re-run kills existing", "pip install succeeds"], "modelTier": "mechanical"}
```
